title: well_assess_livelihood (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_assess_livelihood`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_assess_livelihood` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Livelihood is role, maruah, social position, meaning — not just income.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_assess_livelihood output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
